Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets analyze the event log for Case A1 and B2 which is identical in structure

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: These are all about getting the raw material ready for the actual work Name Material Preparation or Setup and Preparation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: These are the actual manufacturing assembly steps Name Welding Assembly or Component Assembly

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This is checking the quality of the weld Could be Weld Quality Inspection or grouped with final inspection

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets group it as In Process Quality Inspection or keep it under Welding and Inspection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group 1 Material Preparation and Setup Retrieve raw metal sheet Scan barcode Place metal sheet on table Align metal sheet Preheat metal sheet Rationale These events involve fetching the raw material identifying it positioning it and bringing it to the required physical state before the main processing begins They are sequential preparatory actions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group 2 Welding Assembly Pick up welding tool Weld corner A Weld corner B Rationale These events represent the core fabrication assembly action where the tool is acquired and the physical joining welding of the material takes place

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group 3 In Process Quality Inspection Measure weld integrity Rationale This is an immediate automated check to verify the quality of the preceding welding step before moving on to subsequent processing coating It acts as a gatekeeper

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group 4 Surface Treatment Coating Apply protective coating Dry coating Rationale These steps involve applying a finish to the assembled part and curing it They represent a distinct post assembly phase focused on protection and finishing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group 5 Final Quality Assurance Visual check Rationale This is the final manual verification step performed by a dedicated quality operator before the product is considered complete and ready for the next stage or shipping

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The temporal gaps also support these groupings The transition from Operator A Robot Heating to Operator B marks the shift from Prep to Welding The shift to Sensor marks QC The shift to Coating Unit marks Surface Treatment The shift to Operator C marks Final QA Resource changes strongly correlate with phase changes

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets refine the names to be very professional and standard in manufacturing Material Preparation and Setup Welding and Assembly In Process Quality Control Surface Coating and Curing Final Quality Assurance

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check constraints Group low level events into meaningful higher level process steps Done Provide a rationale for how you grouped them Done Propose names for the aggregated high level events Done Return a structured representation Done
